name: Beijing Centergate Technologies (holding) Co., Ltd.
summary: Beijing Centergate Technologies (holding) Co., Ltd. engages in the pharmaceutical production and sales, construction, real estate development, and property management businesses in China and internationally. The company offers dihydroetorphine hydrochloride sublingual tablets; Wujia biochemical capsules; aminophenol tramadol tablets; clindamycin phosphate vaginal gels; Fuqi, a bifonazole cream; Suno, a naloxone hydrochloride injection; Bosu, a bisoprolol fumarate tablet; tramadol hydrochloride drugs; and Yuanzhi, a benididipine hydrochloride tablet. It also provides Festive, a benzocycline hydrochloride tablet; Huasu, a west iodine tablet; Hua Su Yu Chuang brand products, such as toothpaste, mouthwash, spray, dental appliance, and other oral care products; and Huasu Qingqing series products. In addition, the company offers 60+, a pension industry service platform; and Xi Care, a nursing resource integration platform for elderly care service industry. Further, it constructs science park, theatre, and olympic table tennis hall; and offers medical devices for in-vitro diagnostics and specialty hospitals. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Beijing, China.
